title: Foreign Exchange (Gold) (Authorised Dealers and Authorised Depositories) Order, 1995
title_en: Foreign Exchange (Gold) (Authorised Dealers and Authorised Depositories) Order, 1995

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Foreign Exchange, (Gold) (Authorised Dealers and Authorised Depositories) Order.

Subject to the Gold Trading Act and conditions to be issued by the Bank of Tanzania from time to time persons specified in the First Schedule to this Order are authorised to act for the purposes of the Foreign Exchange Act as authorised dealers in relation to gold and are authorised to purchase, sell, import and export gold in whatever form.
The persons specified in the Second Schedule to this Order are authorised to act for the purposes of the Foreign Exchange Act as authorised dealers in relation to foreign exchange.
The persons specified in the Third Schedule to this Order are authorised for the purposes of the Foreign Exchange Act, as authorised depositories.

[Revokes the Exchange Control (Authorised Dealers and Authorised Depositories) Order 1 .] 1 G.N. No. 22 of 1990 First schedule All branches in Tanzania of the Bank of Tanzania, banks licensed under the Banking and Financial Institutions Act 2 and Gold Dealers licensed under the Gold Trading Act 3 . 2 Cap. 342 3 Cap. 127 Second schedule All branches in Tanzania of the Bank of Tanzania, banks licensed under the Banking and Financial Institutions Act 4 and all licensed bureaux de change . 4 Cap. 342 Third schedule All branches in Tanzania of the Bank of Tanzania and banks licensed under the Banking and Financial Institutions Act 5 . 5 Cap. 342 History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
